mapper.insert: INSERT INTO building(building_name, sort, remark, is_deleted) VALUES(#{buildingName}, #{sort}, #{remark}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE building
building_name = #{buildingName}, sort = #{sort}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE building SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM building WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM building WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort
